rulings.Case Title: ROBIN WILSON VS. JUDITH A BOLTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 30, 2015 line 7. Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order Transferred to Department 302 to be heard on February 24, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. together with Motions to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of their papers to department 302 no later than February 2, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of the following courtesy copies: (1) Plaintiff's Reply; and (2) Defendant Corey Bolter's Supplemental Declaration and Objections. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARCELO LECITONA ET AL VS. NATION MORTGAGE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order On Defendants Nationstar Mortgage Llc, Nbs Default Services, Llc, Does 1 To 10
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 30, 2015, line 8. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order On Defendants Nationstar Mortgage Llc, Nbs Default Services, Llc, Does 1 To 10 OFF CALENDAR; TRO is dissolved. Pursuant to CRC 3.1150, "[i]f the responding party has not appeared, the OSC must be served in the same manner as a summons and complaint." Pursuant to January 8, 2015 Order Plaintiff was to serve the Defendants with the Order and Summons and Complaint no later than January 9, 2015 and file a Proof of Service no later than January 20, 2015. Proof of Service filed on January 12, 2015 indicates that only the Order (not the Summons and Complaint) was served and that the service was accomplished by serving "Chris Blackton, employee of Auction.com, agent for Northstar Mortgage, LLC and NBS Default Services, LLC." This is not proper manner of service on an incorporated entity. Supplemental Brief filed on January 16, 2015 was not authorized by the Court and is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA MIRANDA VS. JESSICA KRIEGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Pltf Martha Miranda
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 30, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT GESSIKA KRIEGER's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Martha Miranda GRANTED, Plaintiff failed to comply with the Court's November 6, 2014 order. Request for relief under CCP 473(b) is not properly before the Court. Monetary sanctions granted in the amount of $1,625. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH MEISLIN VS. ARKADIY ZLOBINSKIY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 30, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT ARKADIY ZLOBINSKIY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff's Notice and First Amended Complaint are based on multiple grounds. Asserted deficiencies only as to some of the grounds do not render the Notice/Complaint fatally defective or uncertain. Plaintiff does not need to elect forfeiture in the Notice when the complaint is not based on non-payment of rent. Rutter Guide, Landlord-Tenant 7:147.1. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS HERNANDEZ ET AL VS. GEORGINA MUNOZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 30, 2015, line 13. DEFENDANT GEORGINA MUNOZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party fails to show that all of the issues raised in the notice are barred by res judicata (e.g. breach (3) "by allowing two adult relative to move back in with you, after they had moved out and established residency elsewhere for over 180 days, and without making prior written request to the Owners to do so"). First Amended/Notice is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
